title: SundaraKandam: Hanuman's Divine Mission
subtitle: Retold for the Modern Devotional Reader
description:
SundaraKandam is the most uplifting and hope-filled chapter of the Ramayana. It reveals the boundless power of devotion, courage, humility and unwavering faith in Shri Rama, as shown through Hanuman.

This book is a simple, heartfelt retelling of Sundarakandam, written especially for today's devotional reader. The timeless events are narrated in clear and easy yet simple English language, making them accessible to all age groups while preserving their sacred essence.
excerpt: SundaraKandam is the most uplifting and hope-filled chapter of the Ramayana. It reveals the boundless power of devotion, courage, humility and unwavering faith in Shri Rama, as shown through Hanuman.

title: Upcoming Children's Devotional Book
subtitle: A Spiritual Story for Young Hearts
description: A new children's devotional book currently in progress — bringing sacred stories to young readers in a joyful, simple, and deeply meaningful way. Written especially for children who are beginning their spiritual journey.
excerpt: A heartfelt devotional story written especially for children — making ancient wisdom joyful, simple, and memorable for young readers.

promoReel.caption: A first look at the upcoming children's devotional book by Appu S R
